'''noranaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fabotherapic|fabotherapic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fabotherapic|fabotherapic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| noranaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:noranithi|noranithi]] || [[word:noraniji|noraniji]] || [[word:noranishi|noranishi]] || [[word:noraniki|noraniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:noranuthuthu|noranuthuthu]] || [[word:noranujuju|noranujuju]] || [[word:noranushushu|noranushushu]] || [[word:noranukuku|noranukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:noranuthu|noranuthu]] || [[word:noranuju|noranuju]] || [[word:noranushu|noranushu]] || [[word:noranuku|noranuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:noranufthuf|noranufthuf]] || [[word:noranufjuf|noranufjuf]] || [[word:noranufshuf|noranufshuf]] || [[word:noranufkuf|noranufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:noranethe|noranethe]] || [[word:noraneje|noraneje]] || [[word:noraneshe|noraneshe]] || [[word:noraneke|noraneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:noranothotho|noranothotho]] || [[word:noranojojo|noranojojo]] || [[word:noranoshosho|noranoshosho]] || [[word:noranokoko|noranokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:noranotho|noranotho]] || [[word:noranojo|noranojo]] || [[word:noranosho|noranosho]] || [[word:noranoko|noranoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:noranofthof|noranofthof]] || [[word:noranofjof|noranofjof]] || [[word:noranofshof|noranofshof]] || [[word:noranofkof|noranofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:noranĂŻfthĂŻf|noranĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfjĂŻf|noranĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfshĂŻf|noranĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfkĂŻf|noranĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:noranĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|noranĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|noranĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|noranĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|noranĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:noranĂŻfthĂŻf|noranĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfjĂŻf|noranĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfshĂŻf|noranĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfkĂŻf|noranĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:noranĂŻfthĂŻf|noranĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfjĂŻf|noranĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfshĂŻf|noranĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:noranĂŻfkĂŻf|noranĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:noranĂŠthĂŠ|noranĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:noranĂŠjĂŠ|noranĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:noranĂŠshĂŠ|noranĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:noranĂŠkĂŠ|noranĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:noranathatha|noranathatha]] || [[word:noranajaja|noranajaja]] || [[word:noranashasha|noranashasha]] || [[word:noranakaka|noranakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:noranatha|noranatha]] || [[word:noranaja|noranaja]] || [[word:noranasha|noranasha]] || [[word:noranaka|noranaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:noranafthaf|noranafthaf]] || [[word:noranafjaf|noranafjaf]] || [[word:noranafshaf|noranafshaf]] || [[word:noranafkaf|noranafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:noranasha|noranasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:noranshĂ«sha|noranshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noranrosha|noranrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noranmusha|noranmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:noranyasha|noranyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonorankshĂ«sha|gonorankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonorankrosha|gonorankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonorankmusha|gonorankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonorankyasha|gonorankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:noraranasha|noraranasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:noraranshĂ«sha|noraranshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:noraranrosha|noraranrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:noraranmusha|noraranmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:noraranyasha|noraranyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonorarankshĂ«sha|gonorarankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonorarankrosha|gonorarankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonorarankmusha|gonorarankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonorarankyasha|gonorarankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nerĂŠnasha|nerĂŠnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nerĂŠnshĂ«sha|nerĂŠnshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nerĂŠnrosha|nerĂŠnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nerĂŠnmusha|nerĂŠnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nerĂŠnyasha|nerĂŠnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonerĂŠnkshĂ«sha|gonerĂŠnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonerĂŠnkrosha|gonerĂŠnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonerĂŠnkmusha|gonerĂŠnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonerĂŠnkyasha|gonerĂŠnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:norfanasha|norfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:norfanshĂ«sha|norfanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:norfanrosha|norfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:norfanmusha|norfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:norfanyasha|norfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonorfankshĂ«sha|gonorfankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonorfankrosha|gonorfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonorfankmusha|gonorfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonorfankyasha|gonorfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
